mapper.sql: id_constancia, rfc, anio, cve_unica, nom_emp, ent_fed, area_geografica, qna_ini, qna_fin, imp_sub, isr_anual, sub_no_acre, sub_acre, total_cs, saldo_det, cred_sal, tot_imp, calculo, tipo_contrato
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from tps015_isr_anual
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into tps015_isr_anual (id_constancia, rfc, anio, cve_unica, nom_emp, ent_fed, area_geografica, qna_ini, qna_fin, imp_sub, isr_anual, sub_no_acre, sub_acre, total_cs, saldo_det, cred_sal, tot_imp, calculo, tipo_contrato) values (#{idConstancia,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{rfc,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{cveUnica,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{nomEmp,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{entFed,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{areaGeografica,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{qnaIni,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qnaFin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{impSub,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isrAnual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{subNoAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{subAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalCs,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{saldoDet,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{credSal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totImp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{calculo,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{tipoContrato,jdbcType=CHAR})

insert into tps015_isr_anual
id_constancia,
rfc,
anio,
cve_unica,
nom_emp,
ent_fed,
area_geografica,
qna_ini,
qna_fin,
imp_sub,
isr_anual,
sub_no_acre,
sub_acre,
total_cs,
saldo_det,
cred_sal,
tot_imp,
calculo,
tipo_contrato,

mapper.update:
update tps015_isr_anual
id_constancia = #{record.idConstancia,jdbcType=INTEGER},
rfc = #{record.rfc,jdbcType=CHAR},
anio = #{record.anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
cve_unica = #{record.cveUnica,jdbcType=CHAR},
nom_emp = #{record.nomEmp,jdbcType=CHAR},
ent_fed = #{record.entFed,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
area_geografica = #{record.areaGeografica,jdbcType=CHAR},
qna_ini = #{record.qnaIni,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qna_fin = #{record.qnaFin,jdbcType=INTEGER},
imp_sub = #{record.impSub,jdbcType=INTEGER},
isr_anual = #{record.isrAnual,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
sub_no_acre = #{record.subNoAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sub_acre = #{record.subAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_cs = #{record.totalCs,jdbcType=INTEGER},
saldo_det = #{record.saldoDet,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
cred_sal = #{record.credSal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tot_imp = #{record.totImp,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
calculo = #{record.calculo,jdbcType=CHAR},
tipo_contrato = #{record.tipoContrato,jdbcType=CHAR},

update tps015_isr_anual set id_constancia = #{record.idConstancia,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rfc = #{record.rfc,jdbcType=CHAR}, anio = #{record.anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, cve_unica = #{record.cveUnica,jdbcType=CHAR}, nom_emp = #{record.nomEmp,jdbcType=CHAR}, ent_fed = #{record.entFed,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, area_geografica = #{record.areaGeografica,jdbcType=CHAR}, qna_ini = #{record.qnaIni,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qna_fin = #{record.qnaFin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, imp_sub = #{record.impSub,jdbcType=INTEGER}, isr_anual = #{record.isrAnual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, sub_no_acre = #{record.subNoAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sub_acre = #{record.subAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_cs = #{record.totalCs,jdbcType=INTEGER}, saldo_det = #{record.saldoDet,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cred_sal = #{record.credSal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tot_imp = #{record.totImp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, calculo = #{record.calculo,jdbcType=CHAR}, tipo_contrato = #{record.tipoContrato,jdbcType=CHAR}

update tps015_isr_anual
rfc = #{rfc,jdbcType=CHAR},
anio = #{anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
cve_unica = #{cveUnica,jdbcType=CHAR},
nom_emp = #{nomEmp,jdbcType=CHAR},
ent_fed = #{entFed,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
area_geografica = #{areaGeografica,jdbcType=CHAR},
qna_ini = #{qnaIni,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qna_fin = #{qnaFin,jdbcType=INTEGER},
imp_sub = #{impSub,jdbcType=INTEGER},
isr_anual = #{isrAnual,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
sub_no_acre = #{subNoAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sub_acre = #{subAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total_cs = #{totalCs,jdbcType=INTEGER},
saldo_det = #{saldoDet,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
cred_sal = #{credSal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tot_imp = #{totImp,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
calculo = #{calculo,jdbcType=CHAR},
tipo_contrato = #{tipoContrato,jdbcType=CHAR},
where id_constancia = #{idConstancia,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update tps015_isr_anual set rfc = #{rfc,jdbcType=CHAR}, anio = #{anio,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, cve_unica = #{cveUnica,jdbcType=CHAR}, nom_emp = #{nomEmp,jdbcType=CHAR}, ent_fed = #{entFed,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, area_geografica = #{areaGeografica,jdbcType=CHAR}, qna_ini = #{qnaIni,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qna_fin = #{qnaFin,jdbcType=INTEGER}, imp_sub = #{impSub,jdbcType=INTEGER}, isr_anual = #{isrAnual,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, sub_no_acre = #{subNoAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sub_acre = #{subAcre,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total_cs = #{totalCs,jdbcType=INTEGER}, saldo_det = #{saldoDet,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, cred_sal = #{credSal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tot_imp = #{totImp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, calculo = #{calculo,jdbcType=CHAR}, tipo_contrato = #{tipoContrato,jdbcType=CHAR} where id_constancia = #{idConstancia,jdbcType=INTEGER}
